@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: async_await ∧ minimal_change
P: missing_id → db.findUser → not_found → audit.log → cache.set
V: same_order ∧ one_next(err)
R: ! missing_id_before_db ∧ ! not_found_before_audit
A: promisify(db.findUser) ∧ await(audit.log) ∧ await(cache.set)

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: async/await and minimal_change.
Plan: missing_id then db.findUser then not_found then audit.log then cache.set.
Verify: same validation order and one_next(err).
Risk: high-risk missing id check before database call and high-risk not found check before audit.
Answer target: promisify(db.findUser) and await(audit.log) and await(cache.set).
